title: Frontend Development
desc: Pixel-perfect, accessible interfaces built with React and Next.js — optimised for performance, SEO and a great user experience on every device.

title: Backend Development
desc: Scalable REST APIs and microservices with Node.js and NestJS, backed by well-modelled relational and document databases built for production load.

title: Full Stack Development
desc: End-to-end ownership of your product — from database schema and API design to deployed UI — delivered by a single engineer who understands every layer.
